titleStmt.title: SII 28.286: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 286. (A.R. No. 440 of 1913.) ĀṞAGAḶŪR, ATTUR TALUK, SALEM DISTRICT.

summary.p: Kāmēśvara temple, second prākāra, east wall, right of entrance.

Records a political compact between Āṟagaḷūruḍaiya Irājarāja-dēvaṉ Poṉparappinār alias Kulōttuṅga-chōḻa-Vāṇakōvaraiyar and Kiḷiyūr Maḷaiyamāṉ ••••• of Tirukkōvālūr, each of them undertaking to come to the aid of the other in times of distress. River Āḻvīṉai-āṟu was to be the boundary of the territories under their control.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
10 3 Āvatu Āṟakaḷūruṭaiya Irācarāca tevaṉ poṉparappiṉārāṉa kulottuṅka coḻa vāṇakovaraiyaṟkut tirukkovalūruyai kiḷiyūr malaiyamāṉ
ṅkaḷil nāṭu niṟkumiṭattu Āḻviṉaiyāṟṟukkut teṟku Ivaṟku niṟkavum Ivvāṟṟukku vaṭakku Eṉakku niṟkak kaṭavatākavum kiḻakku nāṭu niṟkumiṭattuk kalliyā
ṭavatākavum Eṅkaḷiliruvomum nāṅkaḷuḷḷataṉaiyum piḻaiyāte niṉṟu Irācakāriyañ ceyyilum vaṉṉiyañ ceyyiluṅ kūṭave ceyyak kaṭavomākavum ki
ṭavomākavum Ivaṟku viṉaiyuṇṭākil Eṉ mutalikaḷum paṭaiyuṅ kutiraiyum pukaviṭṭu Eṉviṉaiyāka Eṟiṭṭuk koṇṭu nokka ṉākavum I
vaṉākavum Eṉakku viṉaiyuṇṭākil Ivarun tam mutalikaḷum Orumā kuta viṭṭut tam viṉaiyāka Eṟaṭṭuk koṇṭu nokkak kaṭavarākavum ttālum no
ḻamalaiyakularāyar viṉaiyiṭaiyāṭṭam Eṉṉuṭaṉe kūṭa nokkit tarak kaṭavarākavum Eṉ meṉṟu coṉṉārai mutalamaiyākki paricarikkakka
maiyāṉukku Eṉ peṇṭukaḷaik kuṭutteṉāveṉ Ippaṭikku Āṟakaḷuril Uṭaiyār tirukkā[ miśva] ramuṭaiya nāyaṉār koyilile kalveṭṭik kuṭu
kularāyaṉ Eḻuttu §
Digital edition of SII 28.286 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
